title: Dual Coding Theory Explained
script_summary: An intriguing explanation of dual coding theory that reveals how we process information.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about dual coding theory than social media does.
Dual coding theory combines verbal and visual information to enhance understanding.
Imagine learning a concept with both images and words—this makes it stick.
Research shows we remember 65% of information paired with visuals.
Use dual coding in your study routine to unlock better retention.
Curious to learn more about your brain? Follow for insights!
